rooms.name: Space Station Docking Bay
rooms.description: You are in the docking bay of an abandoned space station. Stars stretch to the east.

items.name: Console
items.description: A blinking terminal screen. It reads: 'ERROR: Oxygen levels dropping North!'

rooms.name: Control Room
rooms.description: The main command room. Dusty screens line the walls.

items.name: Generator
items.description: A massive quantum core generator. It is currently offline.

items.name: Locker
items.description: A heavy metal locker. It requires an ID Card to unlock.
